title: Builders Tools
description: Builders Tools useful mods & assets for builders in Minecraft
body:
📦 Utility • 🎨 Aesthetic • 🌙 UI • 💡 Shaders

This modpack is built for one purpose: giving builders the best experience possible in Vanilla+ Minecraft. This pack combines essential building tools with lightweight aesthetic improvements—helping you stay efficient, creative, and inspired without straying far from vanilla Minecraft.
--- ### ✨ Core Features - Litematica – Build directly from schematics with precision tools. - Axiom – An all-in-one Minecraft editing tool, combining 3D software features with a clean interface and real-time previews. Offers powerful editing, client-side rendering, and innovative building tools to speed up your workflow. - Build Guide – Project shapes like circles, spheres, and more directly into the world. Fully client-side, works in both singleplayer and multiplayer—even if the server doesn’t have it installed. - Redstone Utility Resource Packs – Easily see dust strength, noteblock notes, and block orientation indicators. --- ### 🎨 Visual & UI Enhancements - Dark Mode GUI – Perfect for late-night building or players who prefer a sleek, darker interface. - Bushy Leaves – Lush, vibrant foliage to make builds pop. - Simple Enchantments – Every enchanted book has a unique, vanilla-style texture, making it easy to identify at a glance. - Shaders Included: - Visual Vibrance Shaders – A clean, vibrant shader inspired by Vibrant Visuals. - Mello Shaders – A pastel-inspired shader with soft beams and a cozy vibe.
